name: worktree-vm
description: One ephemeral Colima VM per git worktree — parallel, isolated build & test.

plugins.name: worktree-vm
plugins.description: One ephemeral Colima VM per git worktree: build & test multiple worktrees in parallel, each isolated in its own kernel + Docker daemon. Runs the project's stock build/test commands inside the VM; browser stays on the host via an SSH tunnel.
